$comment: This file is generated via firehose. DO NOT edit by hand. Make any changes required using the firehose repo instead.
title: metadataGpsCnavEphemeris
description: CNAV Ephemeris describing GPS satellite locations.  Definitions and usage are covered in ICD-GPS-200L, Section 20.3.3.4 and following.

timeOfValidity.description: time_of_validity: Time at which the measurement is considered to be valid.

weekNumber.description: week_number: Full GPS week number calculated from the Modulo 1024 WN in Subframe 1 and the number of GPS week rollovers  Units: weeks

clock.description: clock: GNSS broadcast parameters required to calculate sv clock corrections.

orbit.description: orbit: Keplerian orbit parameters required to calculate satellite position.

tGd.description: t_gd: Group delay differential between L1 and L2.  Units: s

iodc.description: iodc: Issue of Data Clock. 10 bit value from Subframe 1  Units: none

iode.description: iode: Issue of Data Ephemeris. 8 bits repeated in Subframe 2 and Subframe 3. Should match the 8 LSBs of the IODC.  Units: none

iscL1Ca.description: isc_l1_ca: L1 P(Y) to L1 C/A inter-signal correction.  Units: s

iscL2C.description: isc_l2_c: L1 P(Y) to L2C inter-signal correction.  Units: s

iscL5I5.description: isc_l5_i5: L1 P(Y) to L5 I5 inter-signal correction.  Units: s

iscL5Q5.description: isc_l5_q5: L1 P(Y) to L5 Q5 inter-signal correction.  Units: s

deltaA0.description: delta_a_0: Semi-major axis difference at reference time.  Units: m

aDot.description: a_dot: Change rate of semi-major axis.  Units: m/s
